notes.condensation: Pal Condensation raises Partner Skill level and effectiveness
notes.gear: Some skills need Pal Gear (saddles/gloves) unlocked via Technology + Pal Gear Workbench
notes.structure: One entry per skill+pal pair. game8 is primary for descriptions; wiki.gg supplies deck no/type and descriptionWiki when it differs

skills.description: (TBA)

skills.name: Abyssal Celebrity Chef
skills.description: Functions as a water mount that gains movement speed based on the number of Fire or Water Pals in the party.

skills.name: Aegis Shield
skills.description: Functions as mount. Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted.

skills.name: Aerial Marauder
skills.description: Increases the player's damage dealt to enemy weak points while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

skills.name: Aerial Marauder
skills.description: Increases the player's damage dealt to enemy weak points while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

skills.name: Aerial Missile
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

skills.name: Amicable Holy Dragon
skills.description: While Elphidran is your active Pal, it increases the amount of items Dark Pals drop when defeated. Allows the player to ride it as a flying mount while increasing flight speed.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. While fighting together, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Amicable Water Dragon
skills.description: While Elphidran Aqua is your active Pal, it increases the amount of items Fire Pals drop when defeated. Allows the player to ride it as a flying mount while increasing flight speed.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Angry Shark
skills.description: Unleashes a powerful attack when activated. Passively powers up the player's attack while this Pal is in the party.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Aqua Gun. While in team, increases player's Attack.

skills.name: Angry Shark
skills.description: Unleashes a powerful attack when activated. Passively powers up the player's attack while this Pal is in the party.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Spirit Fire. While in team, increases player's Attack.

skills.name: Antigravity
skills.description: Increases the player's max carrying capacity by a moderate amount while Lunaris is on the team.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, Lunaris manipulates gravity, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.name: Aqua Spout
skills.description: While Kelpsea is in your party, the attack of your active Water Pal is increased. When assigned to the Ranch, Kelpsea produces Aquatic Pal Fluids.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases the Attack of Water Pals. Sometimes drops Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Aurora Guide
skills.description: While Foxcicle is in your party, the attack of your Ice Pals is powered up. Occasionally drops Ice Organ when to a Ranch.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Ice Pals.

skills.name: Azure Sovereign
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases for every Dragon Pal in the party.

skills.name: Balmy Weather
skills.description: Functions as mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to Breeding Farm to produce eggs.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While at a base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to Breeding Farm to produce eggs. (Effect does not stack.)

skills.name: Bat Backup
skills.description: While in the party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, appears near the player and picks up nearby items.

skills.name: Bat Backup
skills.description: While in the party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, appears near the player and picks up nearby items.

skills.name: Berry Picker
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Caprity produces Berries. Restores Hunger over time.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Best Boy
skills.description: While in the Party, increases the player's melee weapon damage.

skills.name: Big Stretch
skills.description: While in the party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player.

skills.name: Birds of a Feather
skills.description: Functions as mount. When fighting together, increases chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While fighting together, it becomes easier to encounter pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)

skills.name: Bitter Pop
skills.description: While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion. Occasionally drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Black Ankylosaur
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores, and can obtain more Ore while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage dealt to ores, and you can obtain more Ore while mounted.

skills.name: Black Fox Lord
skills.description: When fighting together, applies Dark damage to the player's attacks and increases them.
skills.descriptionWiki: When fighting together, Changes the player's attack type to Dark.

skills.name: Black Hare
skills.description: Increases the player's attack significantly and changes the player's damage type to Dark while mounting Pyrin Noct.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

skills.name: Black Steed
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. While mounted, changes player's attack type to Dark, inflict Blind, increases Attack.

skills.name: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion
skills.description: While in team, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in possession, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases.

skills.name: Blazing Black Magic
skills.description: While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Blessing of Chaos
skills.description: Functions as a mount. While in party, the Pal alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange of Attack increase.

skills.name: Blessing of Purification
skills.description: Functions as mount. Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.When in team, increases Movement Speed and Attack for every Neutral Pal.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.

skills.name: Blessing of the Flower Spirit
skills.description: Petallia heals the player for a set amount per level when activated. Raises the Planting work suitability level while at base.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, uses medicinal flowers to restore the player's Health.

skills.name: Blizzard Crash
skills.description: Functions as mount. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a Ice-forged hammer.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with an Ice-forged hammer.

skills.name: Botanical Atlas
skills.description: When fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Brandish Blade
skills.description: Bushi dashes towards a target Pal and performs a powerful slash.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

skills.name: Brave Sailor
skills.description: While Penking is your active Pal, it increases the amount of items Fire Pals drop when defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Burning Future
skills.description: Attacking enemies afflicted with Burn triggers an explosion that damages nearby enemies.

skills.name: Caffeine Inoculation
skills.description: Depresso gains a sudden burst of energy which increases its movement speed. The movement speed bonus increases for each level Caffeine Inoculation. May drop Venom Glands when assigned to a Ranch.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, Depresso drinks a massive amount of energy drinks, causing its movement speed to increase for a limited time.

skills.name: Candy Pop
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Woolipop produces Cotton Candy. Woolipop also decreases the hunger depletion while at a base.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Cast-Iron Shell
skills.description: While Warsect is your active Pal, your defense is increased.

skills.name: Cast-Iron Shell
skills.description: While Warsect is your active Pal, your defense is increased.

skills.name: Cat Helper
skills.description: Increases the player's max carrying capacity by a small amount while Cattiva is on the team.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.name: Celestial Darkness
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. Enhances Fire and Dark attacks while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Neutral and Dark attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Cephalo-Princess
skills.description: While in the party, increases Defense of Water Pals.

skills.name: Charging Shell
skills.description: While in the party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify.

skills.name: Charming Fish
skills.description: Functions as a water mount. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals.

skills.name: Charming Spore
skills.description: Increases the Medicine Production Suitability Level of other Base Pals at the base.

skills.name: Cheery Rifle
skills.description: Tanzee arms itself with an assault rifle and shoots enemies in range, dealing neutral element damage for the skill's duration.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

skills.name: Chilled Whale Cruiser
skills.description: Functions as a mount that grants passive bonuses to fishing minigames while in the party.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While fighting together, the fishing minigame starts with the capture gauge higher than usual. Additionally, the capture gauge fills faster when the bar is aligned.

skills.name: Chillswitch
skills.description: While in the party, attacking Electrified enemies triggers an electrical burst that spreads damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Chipper Chimp Gunfire
skills.description: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

skills.name: Clear Mind
skills.description: Can be ridden. Unaffected by the cold or heat while riding this Pal.

skills.name: Cold Bomb
skills.description: Equips Jolthog Cryst in the player's hand. When thrown, it creates a large cold explosion on impact, dealing damage and freezing enemies hit, making them easier to catch. The damage increases for each level of Cold Bomb.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an icy explosion upon impact.

skills.name: Coldhearted King
skills.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.

skills.name: Coldsnap
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attacks to the Ice element and gains increased Attack and Movement Speed based on the number of other Ice Pals in the party.

skills.name: Cool Body
skills.description: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Reindrix. Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.

skills.name: Corruption Laser
skills.description: Functions as a mount. Dualith fires Noct a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.

skills.name: Cozy Whale Cruiser
skills.description: Functions as a mount that improves fishing minigames while fighting alongside the player.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While fighting together, the fishing minigame starts with the capture gauge higher than usual. Additionally, the capture gauge fills faster when the bar is aligned.

skills.name: Crackle Booster
skills.description: While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals.

skills.name: Crater Enthusiast
skills.description: Functions as mount. While in the team, you can obtain more Meteorite Fragments and Pure Quartz.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While in the team, it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment and Pure Quartz.

skills.name: Cryo Instincts
skills.description: Increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals.

skills.name: Dark Gleam Strike
skills.description: Loupmoon leaps and attacks the target enemy. Boosts the Attack Speed of player's melee weapon.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Jumping Claw.

skills.name: Dark Knight of the Abyss
skills.description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. When Twin Spears skill is activated, a Paladius in your party will appear and attack alongside you.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

skills.name: Dark Knowledge
skills.description: While Hoocrates is in your party, your active Dark Pal's attack is increased.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Dark Pals.

skills.name: Dark-Nester
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. While in the party, increases player's and Pal's damage to enemies afflicted with Blind.

skills.name: Darkclaw Hunter
skills.description: Incineram Noct attacks the target enemy with the Nightmare Claw skill, damaging and burning the enemy.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

skills.name: Darkflame Lion
skills.description: While Blazehowl Noct is your active Pal, increases the amount of items Neutral Pals drop when defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Death-Cheating Feline
skills.description: While in the party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus.

skills.name: Demonic Sight
skills.description: While in the party, increases attack power of Dark Pals.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Dark Pals.

skills.name: Desert Empress
skills.description: While at base, boosts Anubis' work speed and efficiency if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities.

skills.name: Dig Here!
skills.description: When grazing in the Ranch, Vixy occasionally finds Pals Spheres, Arrows, and Gold. Vixy can also find Mega Pal Spheres.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch

skills.name: Dig, Dog, Dig!
skills.description: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.

skills.name: Dig, Smokie! Dig!
skills.description: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.

skills.name: Direhowl Rider
skills.description: Increases mount speed and enables mounting for Direhowl.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts

skills.name: Dragon Hunter
skills.description: While Cryolinx is your active Pal, increases the amount of items Dragon Pals drop when defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, Dragon Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Dragon Kaiser
skills.description: Functions as mount. Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Dream Chaser
skills.description: Daedream accompanies you and follows up your attacks with dark magic that increase in damage for each level of Dream Chaser while it is in your party and not set as your active Pal.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.

skills.name: Drill Crusher
skills.description: When activated, Digtoise spins and mines ores with inreased efficiency. Shell Spin's power is also powered up.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, performs Shell Spin, follows the player while spinning and mines ores efficiently.

skills.name: Echo Chamber
skills.description: While in team, Finsider helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory.

skills.name: Eerie Nightstreaker
skills.description: Uses Night Vision in the dark and occasionally digs up Bones while in the Ranch.

skills.name: Egg Layer
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Chikipi produces Eggs.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Eggbomb Launcher
skills.description: Requires Tocotoco's Gloves. While Tocotoco is the active Pal, activate its Partner Skill and it will hop onto the player's arms and will act as a grenade launcher that shoots explosive eggs.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

skills.name: Electro Hunter
skills.description: While fighting together, Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Electro-Massage Incubation
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate Eggs.

skills.name: Ember Chamber
skills.description: While in team, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory. Also increases attack power of Fire Pals.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory. Also increases Attack of Fire Pals.

skills.name: Enchant
skills.description: While in the party, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Entangling Tongue
skills.description: While in the party, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches.

skills.name: Explosive Strength
skills.description: While fighting together, Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Father Winter's Threat
skills.description: While in the party, player can Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.

skills.name: Ferocious Thunder Dragon
skills.description: While in the party, landing bullet hits temporarily boosts the Attack and Defense of your active Pal. The effect can stack multiple times.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Fire Tackle
skills.description: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.
skills.descriptionWiki: When Activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards and enemy and slams into them.

skills.name: Fish Fillet
skills.description: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana. It becomes incapacitated after using Iaigiri or if it stays transformed for an extended period.

skills.name: Flame Lantern
skills.description: Can be ridden to travel quickly across water. While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

skills.name: Flame Wing
skills.description: Increases the player's attack significantly and changes the player's damage type to Fire while mounting Ragnahawk.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.

skills.name: Flameclaw Hunter
skills.description: Incineram attacks the target enemy with the Hellfire Claw skill, damaging and burning the enemy.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

skills.name: Flash Blade
skills.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

skills.name: Floral Boost
skills.description: While at a base, Lullu fills farms with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of crops.
skills.descriptionWiki: While at a base, Lullu fills the farm with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops.

skills.name: Flower Dance
skills.description: While in the party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps.

skills.name: Fluffy
skills.description: While in the party, increases Sweepa's attack and defense.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, Sweepa's stats will be increased.

skills.name: Fluffy Flutterer
skills.description: While in the party, increases the capture rate of Freezed Pals.

skills.name: Fluffy Shield
skills.description: Allows Lamball to be used as a shield. When assigned to the Ranch, Lamball produces Wool.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Fluffy Wool
skills.description: Powers up the attack of Neutral Pals in the party while Cremis is in the party. When assigned to the Ranch, Cremis produces Wool.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Flying Trapeze
skills.description: While in the team, boosts the performance of the equipped glider. Lifts the player slowly while gliding.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, modified the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascent while gliding.

skills.name: Fogged Mind
skills.description: Can be ridden. Changes the Player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

skills.name: Forest Laser
skills.description: Functions as a mount. Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.

skills.name: Fortified Shell
skills.description: When fighting together, increases player's defense and reduces damage recieved from Fire.

skills.name: Fragrant Dragon
skills.description: Increases the Grass damage dealt by the player and Dinossom while mounted. Enables Dinossom to be mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Fried Killamari
skills.description: While in the party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

skills.name: Fried Squid
skills.description: While in team, boosts the performance of the equipped glider. Allows for a slow and extended glide.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

skills.name: Friend of Earth
skills.description: While in the party, increases the Player's Defense while sprinting.

skills.name: Frigid Deity
skills.description: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 5%.

skills.name: Frozen Gleam Strike
skills.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Snow Claw.

skills.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
skills.description: When activated, it significantly increases Gorirat and Gorirat Terra's attacks temporarily.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack for a limited time.

skills.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
skills.description: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat Terra's Attack for a limited time.

skills.name: Full-Power Gorilla Pound
skills.description: While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by 50%. (Does not stack)

skills.name: Fullmetal Shell
skills.description: While Warsect is your active Pal, your defense is increased.

skills.name: Fuzzy Fairy
skills.description: While in the party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered.

skills.name: Gaia Crusher
skills.description: Improves the player's mining and logging efficiency while riding Mammorest.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

skills.name: Galeclaw Rider
skills.description: While in team, boosts the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

skills.name: Gilded Shroud
skills.description: Increases Defense of Neutral Pals and occasionally makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Glaring Cat's Eye
skills.description: Increases the chance of receiving extra Pal Egg. Enables Grintale to be mounted.

skills.name: Gloomhowl
skills.description: Functions as mount. Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks and has blind immunity while mounted.

skills.name: Glorious Mist
skills.description: Functions as a mount. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak.

skills.name: Goddess of the Tranquil Light
skills.description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the health of the player and Party Pals.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, the queen's soothing graces greatly restore the player's Health.

skills.name: Gold Digger
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Mau produces Gold Coins.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to a Ranch.

skills.name: Gold Digger
skills.description: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to a Ranch.

skills.name: Golden Harvest
skills.description: While in team, increases attack power of Ground Pals. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Ground Pals. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin.

skills.name: Golden Scorpion
skills.description: While in party, player's Defense increases by 5%, and Electric Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

skills.name: Grass Dragon Affection
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases attack.

skills.name: Grass Dragon's Affection
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Grass Weaver
skills.description: While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals. While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.

skills.name: Grassland Gymnast
skills.description: While in the party, grants additional jump and additional mid-air dash.

skills.name: Grassland Speedster
skills.description: When fighting together, increases player's movement speed and Changes the player's attack type to Grass

skills.name: Grave Robber
skills.description: While in the party, player and party Pals take less Neutral damage. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Grenadier Panda
skills.description: Allows Mossanda to be mounted and wield a grenade launcher. Mossanda can fire the grenade launcher multiple times to deal Neutral element damage and stun enemies in a large area.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

skills.name: Grenadier Panda
skills.description: Allows Mossanda to be mounted and wield a grenade launcher. Mossanda can fire the grenade launcher multiple times to deal Neutral element damage and stun enemies in a large area.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

skills.name: Grimoire Collector
skills.description: When fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Grinning Death
skills.description: While in the party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack.

skills.name: Ground 'n' Pound
skills.description: While in the party, improves player's and Pal's Grass damage. Increases efficiency when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

skills.name: Grounded Archer
skills.description: Increases bow damage dealt while fighting with Robinquill.

skills.name: Grounding Shell
skills.description: While in the party, player and party Pals take less Water damage, and are immune to Soak.

skills.name: Guardian of the Desert
skills.description: When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to Ground and increases attack. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.
skills.descriptionWiki: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ground. Sometimes dodges attacks with a high speed sidestep in battle.

skills.name: Guardian of the Forest
skills.description: Enables Eikthyrdeer to be mounted. While mounted, Eikthyrdeer can perform a double jump and player gets increased logging efficiency.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

skills.name: Guardian of the Golden Forest
skills.description: Enables Eikthyrdeer Terra to be mounted. While mounted, Eikthyrdeer Terra can perform a double jump and player gets increased logging efficiency.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

skills.name: Guardian of the Snowy Mountain
skills.description: Can be ridden. While at base, increases the Transporting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While in team, Wumpo helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.name: Guardian of the South
skills.description: Can be ridden. While in the party, player and party Pals take less Ground damage and are immune to Muddy status.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While in team, Wumpo Botan helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.name: Happy Clover
skills.description: While at a base, increased Gathering Work Sustainability Level for all other Base Pals.

skills.name: Happy-Go-Lucky Bunny
skills.description: Increases the attack of Neutral Pals in the party while Ribbuny is in the party. Also increases Handiwork Sustainability level for Base Pals.

skills.name: Hard Armor
skills.description: When fighting together, increases player's defense and reduces damage recieved from Fire.

skills.name: Hard Head
skills.description: Increases player's mining efficiency while riding Rushoar.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Increases efficiency of destroying boulders while mounted.

skills.name: Harvest Goddess
skills.description: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the health of the player and Party Pals.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, the queen's soothing graces greatly restore the player's Health.

skills.name: Hawk Eye
skills.description: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

skills.name: Hawk Eye
skills.description: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

skills.name: Heart Drain
skills.description: Lovander and the player heals for a portion of the damage they deal while fighting together.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, grants the player and Loveander the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores Health.

skills.name: Hellflame Lion
skills.description: While Blazehowl is your active Pal, increases the amount of items Grass Pals drop when defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Helper Bunny
skills.description: Flopie accompanies you and picks up items within a certain range and adds them to your inventory.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

skills.name: Herbil Pulse
skills.description: While in team, restores the player's Max Health when incapacitated.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacitated.

skills.name: Hidden Dark Energy
skills.description: While in the party, increases Defense of Dark Pals.

skills.name: Holy Knight of the Firmament
skills.description: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted.

skills.name: Homeward Prayer
skills.description: Teleports you to the nearest base when activated. Cannot be used in dungeons or similar areas.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, moves to the closest base. Cannot be used within dungeons, etc.

skills.name: Hug Me Please
skills.description: While in the party, increases player's and Pal's damage to enemies afflicted with Ivy-Covered.

skills.name: Hug You So Much
skills.description: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Ivy-Covered 2. (Does not stack)

skills.name: Huggy Fire
skills.description: Requires Foxparks's Harness. While Foxparks is the active Pal, activate its Partner Skill and it will hop onto the player's arms and will act as a flamethrower, replacing the player's weapon for the duration.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

skills.name: Huggy Frost
skills.description: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

skills.name: Hungry Missile
skills.description: Allows you to mount Relaxaurus and have it fire a series of rockets while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

skills.name: Ice Crusher
skills.description: Improves the player's mining and logging efficiency while riding Mammorest Cryst.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

skills.name: Ice Overload
skills.description: Functions as a mount that enhances Ice damage for the player and allied Pals.

skills.name: Ice Steed
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Ice and enhances Ice attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Ice Whispers
skills.description: Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Ice-loving Beast
skills.description: Improves the player's mining efficiency while riding Reptyro Cryst.

skills.name: Icewing Dance
skills.description: Functions as a water mount. Increases player's Attack and changes the player's attack type to Ice.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden to travel on water. Changes the player's attack type to Ice while mounted.

skills.name: Icy Maw
skills.description: While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil. Decreases the weight of ingredient and food by a small amount.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.

skills.name: Icy Steed
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes player's attack type to Ice, inflict Freeze, increases Attack/

skills.name: Indestructible Fortress
skills.description: Provides protection from explosions and prevents Stun while in the party.

skills.name: Invisible Eye
skills.description: While in the party, reduces enemy detection.

skills.name: Iron Guardian Mode
skills.description: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis's Attack by 60% and Defense by 60% for a limited time.

skills.name: Jelliette Drop
skills.description: While in team, increases items obtained from fishing. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed is increased.

skills.name: Jellroy Drop
skills.description: While in team, increases items obtained from salvage. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed is increased.

skills.name: Jolt Bomb
skills.description: Equips Jolthog in the player's hand. When thrown, it creates a large electric explosion on impact, dealing damage and shocking enemies hit which stuns them and makes them easier to catch for a moment. The damage increases for each level of Jolt Bomb.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an electrical explosion upon impact.

skills.name: Jolt Glider
skills.description: While in the party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

skills.name: Jumping Force
skills.description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

skills.name: King of Fluff
skills.description: Unlocks the ability to mount Sweepa. Sweepa gains a small damage and defense increase for each Swee included in the party.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. When fighting together, stats will increase the more Swee are in your team.

skills.name: King of Muscles
skills.description: Defense and Movement Speed increases for every Melpaca included in the party. Allows Kingpaca to be mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in a team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.name: King of Muscles
skills.description: While in a team, Kingpaca Cryst helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.name: Kuudere
skills.description: Reveals the locations of nearby Pal Effigies when activated.
skills.descriptionWiki: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.

skills.name: Lady of Dark Lightning
skills.description: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.

skills.name: Lady of Lightning
skills.description: Dazzi accompanies you and follows up your attacks with lightning bolts that increase in damage per Partner Skill level while it is in your party and not set as your active Pal.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.

skills.name: Lantern Enchantment
skills.description: Causes the player's arrows to explode on impact for additional damage.

skills.name: Lava Spout
skills.description: While Kelpsea Ignis is in your party, the attack of your active Fire Pal is increased. When assigned to the Ranch, Kelpsea Ignis produces Flame Organ.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases the Attack of Fire Pals. Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Leap Stance
skills.description: When activated, Croajiro puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's attack is increased.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

skills.name: Liberated Pterosaur
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase for each other Dragon or Dark Pal in your party.

skills.name: Life Steal
skills.description: Felbat and the player heals a portion of the damage they deal while fighting together.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores Health.

skills.name: Lifmunk Recoil
skills.description: Requires Lifmunk's Submachine Gun. While Lifmunk is the active Pal, activate its Partner Skill and it will ride on the player's head, shooting a submachine gun as the player attacks.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follow up player attacks.

skills.name: Light Dancer
skills.description: Functions as a mount that can perform a Boosts Jump Power. Increases Pal's Movement Speed for every Neutral Pal in your party.

skills.name: Lightning Shepherd
skills.description: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Rayhound. Allows Rayhound to double jump while mounted.

skills.name: Logging Assistance
skills.description: Increases the player's logging efficiency and reduces the weight of all wood types while Gumoss is in the party.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, improves efficiency of cutting trees.

skills.name: Long-Sleeved Hurray
skills.description: While in the party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals.

skills.name: Lord Fox
skills.description: When fighting together with Wixen, increases player attack by a small amount and changes the player's damage type to Fire.
skills.descriptionWiki: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Fire.

skills.name: Love's First Blossom
skills.description: Increases the Pal Eggs chance to become an Alpha Egg. Allows Broncherry to be mounted.

skills.name: Mad Eye Lunge
skills.description: When activated, Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

skills.name: Mad Eye Lunge
skills.description: When activated, Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

skills.name: Magical Twin Powers
skills.description: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other base Pals.

skills.name: Magma Kaiser
skills.description: Can be ridden. While in the party, increases the Attack and Defense of the pal fighting alongside you whenever you defeat an enemy.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Magma Overload
skills.description: Functions as a mount. Pal's Attack increases for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.

skills.name: Magma Tears
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Flambelle produces Flame Organs. Slowly recovers health while outside of combat.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes produces Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Masonry Archelon
skills.description: Functions as mount. Increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals.

skills.name: Masquerade Dance
skills.description: While in team, the Pals in the team gain more experience points.

skills.name: Master Archer
skills.description: While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by 15%. (Does not stack)

skills.name: Master Night Angler
skills.description: Can be ridden to travel quickly across water. While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

skills.name: Master of Darkness

skills.name: Master of Unlocking
skills.description: While fighting together, Mimog can open treasure chests without using a key.
skills.descriptionWiki: When near a treasure chest, Mimog can open the chest without using a key. The types of treasure chests that can be opened depend on the skill level

skills.name: Messenger of Death
skills.description: Can be ridden. Decreases the player's cooldown for every enemy defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

skills.name: Meteor Mania
skills.description: While in the team, increases damage dealt to ores, and it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment.

skills.name: Meteor Wings
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. Increases damage of weapon-wielding Pals.

skills.name: Milk Maker
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Mozzarina produces Milk.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes produces Milk when assigned to a Ranch.

skills.name: Mining Assistance
skills.description: Increases mining efficiency and reduces stone weight while in the party.

skills.name: Missile Party
skills.description: Allows you to mount Relaxaurus Lux and have it fire a series of rockets while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

skills.name: Mist Stalwart
skills.description: Grants attacks inflicted with poison while providing immunity to Poison and the World Tree's toxic gas.

skills.name: Modified DNA
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by 15% while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Mother Nature's Menace

skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Poison Fog.

skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Increases movement speed while mounted at night.

skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful [[Nightmare Bloom.

skills.description: Can be ridden. While in the party, reduces weight of all types of ore.

skills.name: Ore-loving Beast
skills.description: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of mining ores while mounted.

skills.description: Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

skills.description: Restores the player's Health. While in party, player and party Pals take less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered.

skills.name: Peacock Poune
skills.description: While fighting together, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens your focus, improving reload speed.

skills.name: Pengullet Launcher
skills.description: Arms a rocket launcher using Pengullet as ammo. On impact, Pengullet explodes and suffers lethal damage in exchange for dealing Neutral element damage, stunning any enemies it hits in a large area.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

skills.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
skills.description: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

skills.name: Phantasmal Arcana
skills.description: While in the party, attacks that inflict Burn deal continuous damage to enemies they come into contact with.

skills.name: Plasma Dash
skills.description: Functions as mount. Also allows dashing in the air and moving at high speed.

skills.name: Plump Body

skills.name: Power Crystal

skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals.

skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, Ground Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.description: Elizabee gains a small damage increase for each level of this Partner Skill. Does not affect Beegarde.
skills.descriptionWiki: When fighting together, stats will increase the more Beegarde are in your team.

skills.name: Rampant Spores
skills.description: Functions as a mount. Occasionally drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to a Ranch.

skills.name: Red Hare

skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.

skills.name: Resentful Pterosaur
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase for each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party.

skills.name: Rider of the Snowy Mountain

skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Runs faster over snow. Can slide quickly down slopes.

skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, it can analyze airborne particles and find a dungeon's exit.

skills.name: Selfless Discipline
skills.description: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 2% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

skills.name: Sentinal of the Great Sea
skills.description: While fighting together, it follows up your attacks with spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel quicky across water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, Fuack body surfs toward an enemy and slams into them.

skills.name: Swift Deity
skills.description: Increases the player's attack significantly and changes the player's damage type to Electricity while mounting Univolt.
skills.descriptionWiki: Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

skills.name: Swift Swimmer
skills.description: Allows the player to travel on water while mounted. Occasionally produces Leather when assigned to a Ranch.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, prevents stamina depletion while moving on water.

skills.name: Swooshy Spores
skills.description: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

skills.name: Swooshy Spores
skills.description: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

skills.name: Tarantriss' Web
skills.description: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider silk to grapple and move at fast speed.

skills.name: Tarantriss’ Web
skills.description: Functions as mount. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed.

skills.name: Telepeck
skills.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Phantom Peck.

skills.name: Thunder Dragon
skills.description: Increases the Electric damage dealt by the player and Dinossom Lux while mounted. Enables Dinossom Lux to be mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Enhances Electric attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Thunderous
skills.description: Increases the player's attack significantly, changes the player's damage type to Electric, and increases Movement Speed while mounting Beakon.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

skills.name: Tidal Predator
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Tiny Spark
skills.description: While Rooby is in your party, your active Fire Pal's defense is increased.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, increases Attack of Fire Pals.

skills.name: Too Cool to be Seen
skills.description: Leezpunk and the player become invisible to enemies.

skills.name: Too Cool to be Seen
skills.description: Leezpunk and the player become invisible to enemies.

skills.name: Travel Companion
skills.description: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Nitewing.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

skills.name: Trick-Loving Fluffle
skills.description: While in the party, generates an explosion and enhances the player's offensive power when Health is critically low.

skills.name: Ultrasonic Sensor
skills.description: When activated, Scans radius for nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap. Higher levels of the skill expand the area of the scan.
skills.descriptionWiki: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect the presence of nearby Pals.

skills.name: Unknown Intruder
skills.description: Functions as mount. While in the party, increases the player's energy weapon damage.

skills.name: Unknown Invader
skills.description: While in the party, increases the damage of the last bullet from full-auto weapon.

skills.name: Untainted Maiden
skills.description: While in the party, increases the player's Attack in party of different Pal species.

skills.name: Unyielding Storm Commander
skills.description: While fighting together, improves Water Pals and the player's damage.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

skills.name: Venom Picker
skills.description: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores Pal's Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch.

skills.name: Void Blade
skills.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri. Increases melee weapon damage when the player is not in combat.

skills.name: Void-Dweller
skills.description: While in the party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat.

skills.name: Warm Body
skills.description: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Arsox. Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.
skills.descriptionWiki: Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.

skills.name: Water Gun
skills.description: While in team, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack.

skills.name: Waterwing Dance
skills.description: Increases the player's attack significantly and changes the player's damage type to Water while mounting Azurobe.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden to travel on water. Changes the player's attack type to Water while mounted.

skills.name: Wind and Clouds
skills.description: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Fenglope. Allows Fenglope to double jump while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

skills.name: Wings of Death
skills.description: Increases the player's attack moderately and changes the player's damage type to Dark while mounting Helzephyr.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

skills.name: Wings of Flame
skills.description: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Movement Speed increases for every other Fire Pal in your party excluding Suzaku.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Wings of Thunder
skills.description: Functions as a flying mount. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

skills.name: Wings of Water
skills.description: Increases the movement speed for every water Pal in the party. Enables Suzaku Aqua to be mounted.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Water attacks while mounted.

skills.name: Winter Trapeze
skills.description: While in team, boosts the performance of the equipped glider. Lifts the player slowly while gliding.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Enables slow ascent while gliding.

skills.name: Witch's Icy Veil
skills.description: While fighting together, increases attack power and changes the player's attack type to Ice.
skills.descriptionWiki: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ice.

skills.name: Wolf of the Sun
skills.description: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Kitsun. Immune to freezing effects while mounted.

skills.name: Worker Bee
skills.description: When assigned to the Ranch, Beegarde produces Honey. Each Beegarde in the party increases Elizabee's Attack.
skills.descriptionWiki: Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch. While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.

skills.name: Wriggling Weasel
skills.description: Increases the player's attack significantly and changes the player's damage type to Dragon while mounting Chillet.
skills.descriptionWiki: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dragon while mounted.

skills.name: Yellow Tank
skills.description: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

skills.name: Yokozuna's Presence
skills.description: Functions as a mount. While in the party, player and party Pals take less Elecric damage and are immune to Electrify.

skills.name: Zephyr Glider
skills.description: While in the team, increases the glider’s speed and movement while preventing fall damage.
skills.descriptionWiki: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.
